community.title: Built by the community, for the community
community.text: Taiko is first and foremost a community — global, inclusive, and open to everyone. Together, we’re scaling Ethereum for the masses.

mission.title: We seek to extend Ethereum for the masses
mission.text: Decentralized and permissionless nodes, proposers, and provers. Anyone can participate in Taiko. Taiko's code is open source and available on GitHub.

fact.title: Fun fact
fact.text_1: Taiko's geth fork is minimally modified and 96% identical to Ethereum's
fact.text_2: Taiko's code is open source and available on GitHub.
